pages.title: Turn-Based Combat
pages.text: Combat in Craftics is turn-based. You and your enemies take turns on a grid arena. Each turn you have $(b)Action Points (AP)$() and $(b)Speed$() to spend.$(br2)$(b)AP$() lets you attack, use items, or perform abilities.$(br)$(b)Speed$() determines how many tiles you can move.

pages.title: Your Turn
pages.text: On your turn:$(br)$(li)$(b)Left-click$() a tile to move there$(br)$(li)$(b)Left-click$() an enemy to attack$(br)$(li)$(b)Right-click$() to use items$(br)$(li)Press $(b)R$() to end your turn$(br2)Moving costs Speed points. Attacking costs 1 AP. You can move AND attack in the same turn!

pages.title: Enemy Turns
pages.text: After you end your turn, each enemy acts. They may:$(br)$(li)Move toward you$(br)$(li)Attack if in range$(br)$(li)Use special abilities$(br)$(li)Flee if wounded$(br2)Watch enemy behavior patterns to plan your strategy!
